ActionPlanTemplate.description: CE Action Plan for Energy - Renewables (Solar and Geothermal) projects. Lead agencies: BLM. Cooperating agencies: USFWS, EPA, SHPO, BIA, WAPA, USFS. EIS likelihood: 70–75%. Litigation guardrails embedded at Draft and Decision phases per outputs/4_litig...
ActionPlanTemplate.name: NEPA CE - Energy - Renewables (Solar and Geothermal)

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Classify Project and Confirm CE Pathway

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Classify Project and Confirm CE Pathway

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Verify NEPA_Pathway__c = CE. Confirm project type matches this permit group. Document project type, lead agency, and sector in the case record. Reference: 40 CFR 1501.4.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Complete CE Extraordinary Circumstances Screening Memo [BLOCKING]

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Complete CE Extraordinary Circumstances Screening Memo [BLOCKING]

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: BLOCKING TASK — CE determination cannot be issued if any extraordinary circumstance applies. Review all 43 CFR 46.215 extraordinary circumstances triggers: Wild and Scenic Rivers, Special Areas (ACEC, Wilderness, NCA), T&E species habitat, Section 106 not concluded, tribal or ANCSA lands, riparian/wetland disturbance. Document findings on the screening memo. Set CE_Extraordinary_Circumstances_Reviewed__c = true after review. If ANY trigger is present, escalate to EA — do NOT issue CE. Citation: 40 CFR 1501.4(b); 43 CFR 46.215.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Assign CE Code with Regulatory Citation

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Assign CE Code with Regulatory Citation

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Assign CE_Code__c and CE_Regulatory_Cite__c from CE_Code_Catalog__mdt. Match to lead agency (BLM) and project type. Confirm acreage thresholds and tiering window are met (EPAct §390: <5 acres, ≤150 lease acres, prior NEPA ≤5 years). Set CE_Complexity_Flag__c = ELEVATED if Program.Num_Sectors__c ≥ 3 (blocks CE — escalate to EA). Citation: 40 CFR 1501.4; CE_Code_Catalog__mdt records.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Notify Cooperating Agencies: USFWS, EPA, SHPO, BIA, WAPA, USFS

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Notify Cooperating Agencies: USFWS, EPA, SHPO, BIA, WAPA, USFS

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Normal

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Send formal notifications to cooperating agencies: USFWS, EPA, SHPO, BIA, WAPA, USFS. Per 40 CFR 1501.8, invite participation and confirm roles. Record confirmed cooperating agencies in Cooperating_Agencies__c field (semicolon-delimited).

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Submit FLPMA Title V Right-of-Way Grant Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit FLPMA Title V Right-of-Way Grant Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit FLPMA Title V Right-of-Way Grant application. Citation: 43 USC 1761; 43 CFR Part 2800. Record permit application number and submission date in Required_Permits__c field.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Submit Geothermal Steam Act Lease Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit Geothermal Steam Act Lease Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit Geothermal Steam Act Lease (geothermal) application. Citation: 30 USC 1002; 43 CFR Part 3200. Record permit application number and submission date in Required_Permits__c field.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Submit UIC Class V Permit for geothermal fluid injection Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit UIC Class V Permit for geothermal fluid injection Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Normal

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit UIC Class V Permit for geothermal fluid injection application. Citation: 42 USC 300h; 40 CFR Part 144. Record permit application number and submission date in Required_Permits__c field.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Submit ESA Section 7 Formal Consultation Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit ESA Section 7 Formal Consultation Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit ESA Section 7 Formal Consultation application. Citation: 16 USC 1536. Record permit application number and submission date in Required_Permits__c field.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Initiate ESA Section 7 Informal Consultation (if listed species present)

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Initiate ESA Section 7 Informal Consultation (if listed species present)

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Normal

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: If project area contains habitat for listed species: initiate informal ESA Section 7 consultation with USFWS/NOAA-NMFS. For CE actions, informal consultation (may affect, not likely to adversely affect) is typically sufficient. Obtain concurrence letter. Citation: 16 USC 1536(a)(2); 50 CFR 402.13.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Initiate NHPA Section 106 Consultation with SHPO (if historic resources present)

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Initiate NHPA Section 106 Consultation with SHPO (if historic resources present)

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Normal

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: If project has an Area of Potential Effect on historic properties: initiate Section 106 consultation with SHPO. For CE actions this is typically an abbreviated review. Set Section_106_Complete__c = true when concurrence received. Citation: 54 USC 306108; 36 CFR Part 800.

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Issue CE Determination Record (CE-DR) [BLOCKING]

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: BLOCKING TASK — CE-DR is the formal decision document concluding the CE pathway. Create ContentVersion record with Doc_Type__c = CE_DR, and attach signed CE determination. CE-DR must cite: CE authority code, regulatory cite, extraordinary circumstances finding, and any extraordinary circumstances reviewed and found inapplicable. Citation: 40 CFR 1501.4; 40 CFR 1507.3(e)(2)(ii).

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Index Administrative Record Documents [BLOCKING]

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: BLOCKING TASK — AR must be indexed before the record is locked. Set AR_Index_Position__c on each ContentVersion record tied to this application. Required CE AR documents: CE Extraordinary Circumstances Memo, CE Determination Record (CE-DR), and any permit applications or consultation correspondence. Citation: 40 CFR 1505.2; APA 5 USC 706.
